tools.name: sota-optimize
tools.description: Fuehrt Prompt durch alle 5 Strategien: Cache->Compress->Route->Limit->API.
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost import get_optimizer; import json; print(json.dumps(get_optimizer().stats(), indent=2))

tools.name: sota-complexity
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost import get_optimizer; import sys as s2; o=get_optimizer(); print(o.estimate_complexity(s2.argv[1] if len(s2.argv)>1 else '', s2.argv[2] if len(s2.argv)>2 else ''))

tools.name: sota-stats
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost import get_optimizer; import json; print(json.dumps(get_optimizer().stats(), indent=2))

tools.name: sota-best-model
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost import get_optimizer; import sys as s2; o=get_optimizer(); print(o.best_model_for_complexity(s2.argv[1] if len(s2.argv)>1 else 'mid'))

tools.name: cost-status
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost.codeburn_daemon import CodeBurnMonitor; import json; m=CodeBurnMonitor(); s=m.status(); s['budget_limit']=m.budget_limit; s['budget_pct']=m.budget_pct(); print(json.dumps(s,indent=2))

tools.name: cost-optimize
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost.codeburn_daemon import CodeBurnMonitor; import json; m=CodeBurnMonitor(); opts=m.optimize(sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else '30days'); print(json.dumps(opts,indent=2) if opts else 'No suggestions')

tools.name: cost-yield
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost.codeburn_daemon import CodeBurnMonitor; import json; m=CodeBurnMonitor(); print(json.dumps(m.yield_report(sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else 'week'),indent=2))

tools.name: cost-auto-optimize
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost.auto_optimizer import AutoOptimizer; import json; a=AutoOptimizer(); r=a.apply(dry_run=sys.argv[1].lower()!='false' if len(sys.argv)>1 else True); print(json.dumps(r,indent=2))
